examples.eng: The milk was beginning to spoil.
I'll start at the very beginning.
Go back to the beginning of the song.
The rye was beginning to ear.
Night was beginning to fall.
This was not a promising beginning.
examples.ru: Это было отнюдь не многообещающее начало.

examples.eng: the beginning of a new epoch
We're beginning to live at last!
Stock prices are beginning to soar.
examples.ru: Цены на акции начинают стремительно повышаться (в цене).

examples.eng: The paint is beginning to flake off.
I opposed it from the very beginning.
examples.ru: Я был против этого с самого начала.

examples.eng: Their love was just beginning to bloom.
He's beginning to get face in that company.
examples.ru: Он становится важным человеком в компании.

examples.eng: I feel like I've been offered a new beginning.
examples.ru: Чувствую себя так, словно мне предложили начать все сначала.

examples.eng: The whole trip was a disaster from beginning to end.
examples.ru: Вся поездка, от начала до конца, была просто горе какое-то.

examples.eng: Could we start at the beginning? Tell me where you first met him.
examples.ru: Нельзя ли начать с самого начала? Расскажите, где вы впервые с ним встретились.

examples.eng: He was beginning to get angry.
the beginning of a new millennium
Her mind was beginning to wander.
Your hair is beginning to fall out.
My boots are beginning to wear out.
The economy is beginning to revive.
Run the tape back to the beginning.
Wind the tape back to the beginning.
by the beginning of the next century
Philanthropy was beginning to stale.
The fever was beginning to take hold.
examples.ru: Лихорадка начала давать о себе знать.

examples.eng: a chapter beginning several pages back
examples.ru: глава, которая началась несколько страниц назад

examples.eng: Our plans are beginning to take shape.
So much that was not is beginning to be.
examples.ru: Так много из того, чего раньше не было, появляется.
